name: Linsensuppe Mit Frankfurter (Lentil Soup with Frankfurters)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the green onions.
2. Wash the lentils thoroughly.
3. In a 2½-quart saucepan, bring 6 cups of water to a boil.
4. Add the lentils, bacon, chopped green onion, carrot, and celery to the boiling water; simmer, partially covered, for 30 to 40 minutes.
5. In a frying pan, sauté the chopped onion in vegetable oil until soft.
6. Sprinkle flour over the onions and stir.
7. Lower the heat and stir constantly, cooking until the flour turns light brown.
8. Stir in half a cup of hot lentil soup into the browned flour; beat with a wire whisk until well blended.
9. Add vinegar and mix with the contents of the frying pan.
10. Add to the lentil pot and stir together.
11. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until lentils are soft.
12. Add the frankfurters, catsup, salt, and pepper; cook until the frankfurters are heated through. Serve hot.
